summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Indian logistics broker LR workflow feature. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all LR features: trips list with LR number and workflow step columns, trip detail page with step-based workflow progress, all LR sections (Vehicle Details, Basic Details, Consignment Details, Invoice Details), Trip Advances tab with Billing Entity and Vendor Bill cards, Documents tab with LR/Invoice/POD sections, Edit LR Details functionality, workflow step change by clicking, and outstanding amount calculation.

integration_issues.issue: Fixed: Frontend sent empty string for optional delivered_date field causing 422 validation error. Fixed by converting empty string to null before submission.

critical_code_review_comments: All database operations use MOCK_DB (in-memory store) - data resets on server reload
Document storage uses mock URLs pointing to mock-storage.com
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded trip (id=1) with LR-2025-000001 and TRIP_ADVANCES workflow step
context_for_next_testing_agent: LR workflow feature testing complete. All features verified: (1) Trips list shows LR number and workflow step columns, (2) Trip detail page shows 4-step workflow progress with clickable steps, (3) LR Details tab shows Vehicle Details, Basic Details, Consignment Details, Invoice Details sections, (4) Trip Advances tab shows Trip Details, Billing Entity, Vendor Bill cards with correct outstanding calculation (base_freight + additionals - deductibles - advance_paid), (5) Documents tab shows LR/Invoice/POD sections, (6) Edit mode enables field editing, (7) Creating new trip auto-generates LR number. Backend uses MOCK in-memory database.

trip_detail_page.workflow_steps: PASS - 4 steps: LR Creation, Document Verification, Trip Advances, POD Upload
trip_detail_page.workflow_step_click: PASS - Steps are clickable and update workflow

lr_details_tab.vehicle_details: PASS - Shows Vehicle No, Transporter, Phones
lr_details_tab.basic_details: PASS - Shows From/To, Consignor/Consignee, DC/OA, GP/DO
lr_details_tab.invoice_details: PASS - Shows E-way Bill, Seal Number, Invoice Number

documents_tab.lr_documents: PASS - Section present with upload capability

trip_advances_tab.trip_details_card: PASS - Shows Code, Vehicle, Route, Transporter, Loading Date, Status
trip_advances_tab.billing_entity_card: PASS - Shows PAN, Name, TDS Category, Status
trip_advances_tab.vendor_bill_card: PASS - Shows Base Freight, Additionals, Deductibles, Total, Advance Paid, Outstanding

trip_detail_page.edit_mode: PASS - Edit LR Details button enables form editing with Save/Cancel

features_tested.trip_creation: PASS - Creates trip with auto-generated LR number and default LR_CREATION step
